name: Floating rate reference period—Leg 2
description: Reports floating rate reference period information about applicable Leg 2 floating rates.
format: Four-character code for the time unit of the frequency (e.g., MNTH)
optionalityRules: Conditionally required where Indicator of the floating rate—Leg 2 is reported (page 133, Condition table, paragraph 505).
Required if Indicator of the floating rate—Leg 2 is reported (page 134, paragraph 509(a)(i)).
valueRules: If reported, the formats of the values conform to the 2024 Rules specifications (page 134, paragraph 509(b)).
Values are not reported for the not-reported Action types (page 134, paragraph 509(c)).
Not reported if Indicator of the floating rate—Leg 2 is not reported in circumstances of paragraph 499 (page 134, paragraph 506).
